subcodes.first_line: O seeker! Hearken unto the Call from the exalted Lote-Tree, beyond the Pen of Eternity, upon the luminous Spot [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا طالب اسمع الندآء من السدره المرتفعه خلف قلم من البقاء علی البقعه النوراء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @transcendence; unknowability of God
